message:
feat(demo): add mermaid mega showcase with all diagram types

New mega showcase demonstrating comprehensive Mermaid diagram support:

mermaid_mega_showcase.rs:
- Flowchart with complex node shapes and edge types
- Sequence diagram with actors and messages
- Class diagram with inheritance and associations
- State diagram with transitions and nested states
- Entity-relationship diagram with cardinality
- Gantt chart with milestones and dependencies
- Pie chart with dynamic data
- Mindmap with hierarchical structure
- Help overlay with keyboard shortcuts
- Collapsible sections for space management
- Viewport override mode for large diagrams

mermaid_showcase.rs:
- Integration updates for mega showcase navigation

mod.rs:
- Export new mega showcase screen
- Update screen enumeration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -273,8 +273,15 @@ pub const SCREEN_REGISTRY: &[ScreenMeta] = &[
         title: "Mermaid Showcase",
         short_label: "Mermaid",
         category: ScreenCategory::Visuals,
-        palette_tags: &["mermaid", "diagram", "render"],
-        blurb: "Interactive Mermaid diagram showcase.",
+        palette_tags: &[
+            "mermaid",
+            "diagram",
+            "render",
+            "layout",
+            "diagnostics",
+            "controls",
+        ],
+        blurb: "Interactive Mermaid diagrams with layout diagnostics and live controls.",
         default_hotkey: None,
         tour_step_hint: Some("Mermaid engine"),
     },
@@ -283,8 +290,16 @@ pub const SCREEN_REGISTRY: &[ScreenMeta] = &[
         title: "Mermaid Mega Showcase",
         short_label: "MermaidMega",
         category: ScreenCategory::Visuals,
-        palette_tags: &["mermaid", "diagram", "interactive", "mega"],
-        blurb: "Comprehensive Mermaid diagram lab with all knobs.",

+        ],
+        blurb: "Comprehensive Mermaid diagram lab with performance knobs and diagnostics.",
         default_hotkey: None,
         tour_step_hint: None,
     },
